objective: Decouple artifacts directory from hardcoded paths and fix Docker permission denied errors.

completed: Added ARTIFACTS_DIR env variable support to config/env.ts, allowing centralized configuration.
Replaced hardcoded artifacts paths across the repository with ENV.ARTIFACTS_DIR to route publisher run screenshots/traces to properly permissioned directories.
Added ARTIFACTS_DIR environment variable in Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml pointing to /app/data/artifacts volume.
Called capArtifactsBySize() in resourceMonitor.ts runGarbageCollection() to automatically enforce 500MB sizing limits.
Fixed TypeScript linter errors in competitor-ad-sqlite.ts database migration routines.
Ran all unit, integration, and linting checks successfully.

acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded 'artifacts' strings referring directly to process.cwd() or PROJECT_ROOT.
Container writes trace files and debug screenshots to /app/data/artifacts volume instead of /app/artifacts.
Garbage collection caps artifacts directories under 500MB.
TS compilation passes without linter errors in database layers.
completed_items: Replace hardcoded paths in diagnostics.ts, resourceMonitor.ts, publisherHistory.ts, kakaoSkill.ts, runtimeControls.ts, competitor-ad-sqlite.ts, llmCache.ts, parserSignal.ts.
Fix ts lint issues in competitor-ad-sqlite.ts.
